pricingJustification: Affordable pack for 19 employees — Core HR (documents, org chart, onboarding), Time Off, Performance, plus Recruitment ATS add-on
context: Georgia, USA headquarters with remote team members in Morocco and other countries. 19 employees. First time evaluating HR software. Currently using Google Drive, email, Google Sheets, and a separate e-signature tool.
priorities: Organize employee documents per person, smooth onboarding and offboarding with SOPs and company overview, org chart, vacation tracking, performance management and one-on-ones, integrated e-signatures, ATS/recruitment pipeline.
mobileStory: Remote team across US and international locations — self-service access to documents, time-off requests, and onboarding materials from anywhere.
operationsStory: Starter Productivity bundle replaces Google Drive document chaos, email-based vacation requests, and spreadsheet tracking with a single HR platform.
documentsStory: Core HR module centralizes resumes, IDs, personal letters, and onboarding documents per employee — with built-in e-signatures replacing the separate tool.
recruitmentStory: Recruitment add-on (ATS) covers the full hiring process from job posting to candidate pipeline — first HR software evaluation for the company.
payrollStory: Payroll is handled by a third party. Factorial does not process payroll — it syncs with however payroll is currently managed.
implementationStory: Decision target this week. Implementation as soon as possible — goal to start next week after vendor selection.
nextSteps: Product demo with Rikia Jamil (Executive Assistant). Rikia presents findings to manager for final decision. Target: decide this week, go-live next week.
